basics.name: Matteo Spanio
basics.label: Software engineer
basics.summary: Hybrid musician and software engineer with a passion for music and technology. His fields of interest are artificial intelligence, cybersecurity and music production.

work.name: Audio Innova S.r.l.
work.summary: Audio Innova is a company that develops and manufactures innovative audio products for the professional and consumer markets.
highlights: Developed a new algorithm for the automatic detection of damaged parts of audio tapes recorded on magnetic media

work.name: Orchestra di Padova e del Veneto
work.summary: The Orchestra di Padova e del Veneto is a symphony orchestra based in Padua, Italy. It was founded in 1967 by the Veneto Region and the Municipality of Padua.
highlights: Performed with world-renowned conductors and soloists
Performed ranging from classical to contemporary repertoire with piccolo clarinet, clarinet and bass clarinet

education.institution: Università degli Studi di Padova, Italy
education.studyType: Ph. D. program Brain, Mind and Computer Science

education.institution: Conservatorio di Musica "Cesare Pollini", Padua, Italy

awards.title: Finalist
awards.summary: Finalist in Jeopardy and Capture the Flag competitions hosted by the Cibersecurity National Laboratory

awards.title: Certificate of Appreciation
awards.summary: For outstanding contribution to the development of Conformance Testing Context-based Audio Enhancement (MPAI-CAE) standard

certificates.name: Cybersecurity Analyst
